steps.t: Gársig's Farm is on the far eastern side of the Fallows, near the Wold.
Manléof, who was left behind at Gársig's Farm, is in very poor condition. He isn't likely to live much longer.
Manléof didn't survive the encounter with Warg-riders at Gársig's Farm. You should let Siric know what has happened, and he is awaiting your return at…
